title: How to find low-cost health care in your community
meta-title: Where to Receive Low Cost Health Care in Your Community
meta-description: Learn how to get free or low-cost health care and dental care at your community health center even with no insurance.
bite: If you can't afford any health plan, you can get low-cost health care at a community health center.
seo-keywords: low cost health coverage affordable health care annual household income
page_name: How to find low-cost health care in your community
page_topic: How to find low-cost health care in your community
excerpt: Learn how to get free or low-cost health care and dental care at your community health center even with no insurance.
content:
If you can't afford any health plan and don’t qualify for coverage through Medicaid and the Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP), you can get low-cost health care at a nearby community health center.

How much you pay depends on your income. Community health centers are located in both urban and rural areas. They provide:

  • Prenatal care
  • Baby shots
  • General primary care
  • Referrals to specialized care, including mental health, substance abuse, and HIV/AIDS

Locate a community health center near you.

Visit TrumpRx.gov if you need prescription drugs but don't have coverage. TrumpRx has special offers and low prices for certain prescription drugs and works outside of Marketplace coverage.
